creator: gavin@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

To submitter: Thank you for your submission.  A slightly more complete 
update has been submitted in ports/172405 a couple of days ago, so 
I think it's best to close this PR and keep the other one. 

Thank you for taking the time to submit this update though, it is 
appreciated! 

Gavin
